prompt: Review how the source-retrieval tool affected this completed coding workflow. Rank confirmed product defects, deployment or version-freshness problems, routing or discoverability gaps, capabilities already present, and follow-up evaluations. For every claim, record evidence type, exact version or revision, confidence, affected boundary, a counterfactual intervention, and what would disprove the claim. Recommend upstream product changes only where supplied evidence supports them.
semantic_gate: A behavior seen only on an older pinned runtime cannot be labeled a current product defect without current-version evidence.
